# Fimber Elemuwa — Technical Content Writer & Developer

## Who I Am

Fimber Elemuwa is a technical content writer and developer based in Nigeria with 4+ years of experience producing SEO-driven, product-led content for B2B SaaS brands. He specialises in translating complex technical concepts — authorization, web scraping, frontend development, AI tooling — into content that educates developers and drives organic growth.

## What I Do

- **Technical Content Writing** — In-depth tutorials, how-to guides, and thought leadership articles for developer and SaaS audiences
- **SEO-Optimised Content** — Keyword research, content briefs, internal linking, and on-page optimisation baked into every piece
- **Product-Led Content** — Writing that ties product value directly to ICP pain points and funnel stages
- **Content Strategy** — Topic clustering, editorial SOPs, competitive keyword research

## Key Strengths

- SEO-driven quality: every piece is crafted to rank with deep research and technical accuracy
- Clear, consistent communication: full alignment from kickoff to delivery
- On-time delivery: no delays, no excuses

## Stats

- 4+ years of experience
- 10+ satisfied clients
- 40+ completed projects
- 90% client retention rate

## Clients & Publications

- **SaaSGroup** (Oct 2023 – Present) — Product-led, SEO-optimised content for B2B SaaS brands; builds briefs, outlines, and internal linking maps
- **Permify** (Aug 2024 – Present) — In-depth articles on fine-grained authorization, RBAC, policy modeling; contributed to 25% traffic lift on priority topics
- **Scrape.do** (Aug 2024 – Present) — Advanced tutorials on dynamic site scraping, anti-bot tactics, CAPTCHA handling; drives ~35% organic growth on key articles
- **LogRocket** (Jun 2022 – Present) — Technical articles on frontend and developer tooling for a broad developer audience
- **SitePoint** (Oct 2022 – Dec 2022) — Technical deep dives on frontend technologies and AI-driven workflows
- **Refine** (Dec 2022 – Jan 2023) — SEO strategy delivering 20% organic traffic lift; co-created infographics raising engagement 60%
- **InPlainEnglish / Medium** (Apr 2023 – Sep 2023) — Publication manager overseeing multiple Medium publications reaching 50k+ monthly readers

## Selected Work

- LogRocket articles: https://blog.logrocket.com/author/fimberelemuwa/
- Scrape.do articles: https://scrape.do/authors/fimber/

## Testimonials

**Raisa Yogiaman, Content Marketer, saas.group:**
"Working with Fimber over the past couple of years has been an absolute pleasure. He consistently brings his A-game to every piece of content he creates. He fact-checks every claim, tailors his writing perfectly to the target audience, and always meets deadlines — no matter how tight they are."

**Shannon Kelly Ash, Head of Content Marketing, saas.group:**
"What really stands out about Fimber is his openness to feedback, clear communication, and commitment. He takes initiative, and consistently delivers high-quality work — no matter the deadline or complexity of the project."

**Sunil Sandhu, CEO, In Plain English:**
"Fimber is able to grasp new concepts and explain them in a way that is easy-to-understand and feels familiar. I have no reservations in recommending Fimber's services for content creation."

## Technical Skills

React, Python, Node.js, Three.js, Git — Fimber's developer background means he can read, run, and verify code before writing about it.

## Site Structure

- `/blog` — Article index
- `/blog/:slug` — Individual blog posts
